description: Create Chinese README, add language switchers to both READMEs, and update skills/CATALOG.md with the 8 new software engineering skills.
steps: Add language switcher to the first line of README.md
Create README.zh-CN.md with full Chinese translation
Update skills/CATALOG.md with Software Engineering Workflow category
acceptance_criteria: README.md has language switcher as first line linking to README.zh-CN.md
README.zh-CN.md exists with full Chinese translation and language switcher
skills/CATALOG.md has new 'Software Engineering Workflow' section with all 8 skills
New catalog section is between 'Development & Technical' and 'Enterprise & Communication'
findings: All documentation changes implemented successfully. Language switchers added to both READMEs, full Chinese translation created, and catalog updated with all 8 new skills in the Software Engineering Workflow category.
